channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [GOCOLORS] Go Fashion (India) Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure for Q4 and FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Go Fashion (India) Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons of the company. This closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's Code of Conduct. The trading window will be closed from April 01, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of the Annual Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting to consider the Annual Audited Financial Results will be intimated separately.

  • Go Fashion (India) Ltd announces trading window closure for Q4 and FY 2025-2026.
  • Closure is in accordance with SEBI regulations and the company's Code of Conduct.
  • Trading window to close from April 01, 2026, and remain closed till 48 hours after Annual Audited Financial Results declaration.
  • The date of the Board Meeting to consider the Annual Audited Financial Results will be informed separately.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Go Fashion (India) Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [NAM-INDIA] Nippon Life India Asset Management Ltd to Consider Audited Financial Results for Q4 and FY 2025-2026, Recommend Dividend
item.description:
Nippon Life India Asset Management Ltd has announced a Board Meeting on April 27, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026. The meeting will also recommend dividend on equity shares, if any. The trading window close period for designated persons and connected persons covered under the Code will commence from April 1, 2026, and end on April 29, 2026.

  • Nippon Life India Asset Management Ltd to consider audited financial results for Q4 and FY 2025-2026
  • Board Meeting scheduled on April 27, 2026, to recommend dividend on equity shares, if any
  • Trading window close period for designated persons and connected persons from April 1, 2026, to April 29, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nippon Life India Asset Management Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [USHAMART] Trading Window of Usha Martin Ltd. to Close from 1st April 2026
item.description:
Usha Martin Ltd. has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives, effective from 1st April 2026. The closure will last until 48 hours after the declaration of the company's audited financial results for the quarter and year ending 31st March 2026. The date of the board meeting for the consideration of these results will be announced in due course.

  • Usha Martin Ltd. to close its trading window from 1st April 2026
  • Closure due to the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter and year ending 31st March 2026
  • Trading window to reopen 48 hours after the declaration of results
  • Board meeting date for consideration of results to be announced later
  • Announcement made in accordance with the Company’s Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Designated Persons and their Immediate Relatives

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: USHA MARTIN LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SOFCOM] Sofcom Systems Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
Sofcom Systems Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for Directors, Promoters, and Designated Persons from April 01, 2026. The closure will remain in effect until 48 hours after the dissemination of the audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended on March 31, 2026, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's Code of Conduct.

  • Sofcom Systems Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for Directors, Promoters, and Designated Persons.
  • The closure will be effective from April 01, 2026.
  • The trading window will reopen 48 hours after the dissemination of the audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended on March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sofcom Systems Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [OMKAR] Omkar Overseas Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window for Audited Financial Result Declaration
item.description:
Omkar Overseas Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for directors, officers, designated employees, and their immediate relatives. The closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations 2015 and the company's Code for Prohibition of Insider Trading. The trading window will remain closed from 1st April 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended on 31st March 2026. The exact date of the financial results declaration will be intimated in due course.

  • Omkar Overseas Ltd announces closure of trading window for directors, officers, and designated employees
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations 2015 and the company's Code for Prohibition of Insider Trading
  • Trading window to remain closed from 1st April 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results
  • The declaration of the financial results is yet to be intimated
  • The move is aimed at ensuring transparency and fairness in trading

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OMKAR OVERSEAS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [MODMA] Modern Malleables Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
Modern Malleables Ltd, a company listed on the stock exchange, has announced the closure of its trading window. This decision comes in accordance with the company's code of conduct for prevention of insider trading, as formed under the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 (as amended). The trading window will be closed for all designated persons and will remain closed immediately after the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter and year ended on 31st March, 2026. The announcement was made by the Head of Listing Department, Phiroze Jeejeebhoy, at Dalal Street, Fort Mumbai, 400001. This is for the information and records of Modern Malleables Limited, Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, Gautam Bharati.

  • Modern Malleables Ltd announces closure of trading window
  • Closure in accordance with the company's code of conduct for prevention of insider trading
  • Trading window to close immediately after declaration of audited financial results for Q1 and year ended on 31st March, 2026
  • Announcement made by the Head of Listing Department, Phiroze Jeejeebhoy
  • Information shared with Modern Malleables Limited, Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, Gautam Bharati

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Modern Malleables Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SHAHLON] Shahlon Silk Industries Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure from April 1, 2026
item.description:
Shahlon Silk Industries Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons, their immediate relatives, and insiders from April 1, 2026. The closure will remain in effect until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The company has also complied with SEBI circulars regarding trading window closure period under the PIT Regulations. The date of the Board Meeting for the consideration of the audited financial results will be communicated in due course.

  • Trading window closure from April 1, 2026
  • Closure applies to all designated persons, their immediate relatives, and insiders
  • Closure lasts until 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results
  • Compliance with SEBI circulars regarding trading window closure period
  • Date of Board Meeting to be communicated later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shahlon Silk Industries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BANDHANBNK] Bandhan Bank Ltd. Closes Trading Window under SEBI Regulations until 48 hours after Q4 Results
item.description:
Bandhan Bank Ltd. has announced the closure of its trading window for Designated Persons, their immediate relatives, Auditors, and Connected Persons, as per the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The closure will commence from April 01, 2026, and will remain in effect until 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the fourth quarter and financial year ending on March 31, 2026. The date of the Board meeting for the approval of these results will be intimated in due course.

  • Bandhan Bank Ltd. closes trading window for Designated Persons, their immediate relatives, Auditors, and Connected Persons
  • Closure in effect from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after Q4 and financial year ending on March 31, 2026 results
  • The date of the Board meeting for the approval of these results will be announced later
  • Regulation: SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Bandhan Bank follows 'Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading' and 'Code of Practices and Procedures for Fair Disclosure of Unpublished Price Sensitive Information'

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bandhan Bank Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BERLDRG] Promoter & Director of Beryl Drugs Ltd Acquires 0.14% Shares
item.description:
Beryl Drugs Ltd has submitted a disclosure under Regulations 7 (2) of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. Sudhir Sethi, the main Promoter & Director of the Company, has acquired 7500 shares (constituting 0.14%) of the company. The company has requested the Bombay Stock Exchange to kindly take the same in their records and acknowledge the receipt.

  • Sudhir Sethi, Promoter & Director of Beryl Drugs Ltd, acquires 0.14% shares of the company
  • Beryl Drugs Ltd submits disclosure under Regulations 7 (2) of SEBI Prohibition of Insider Trading Regulations, 2015
  • The acquisition consists of 7500 shares of the company
  • The Bombay Stock Exchange is requested to record and acknowledge the receipt of the disclosure

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BERYL DRUGS LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [CHTR] Chatterbox Technologies Ltd. Approves CSR Fund Utilization, Office Relocation, and Special Purpose Financial Statements
item.description:
Chatterbox Technologies Ltd., in a Board Meeting held on March 25, 2026, approved the utilization of CSR funds amounting to ₹17,10,000/- through an implementing agency. The company also approved the change of its registered office within the same city from Unit No. 101, VIP Plaza Co-operative Premises Society Ltd., Andheri New Link Road, Opp. Infinity Mall, Behind Crystal Plaza, Andheri West, Mumbai – 400053 to Unit No. 1101 & 1102, 11th Floor, Lotus signature, Veera Desai Road, Andheri West, Mumbai -400053 with effect from 1st April, 2026. Additionally, the Board approved the Special Purpose Financial Statements in accordance with IFRS requirements for the period from 1st January, 2025 to 31st December, 2025 for the purpose of consolidation and submission to the Parent Company.

  • Approval of CSR funds utilization
  • Change in registered office
  • Approval of Special Purpose Financial Statements

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Chatterbox Technologies Ltd | Category: Monthly Update
